data.body: COMPLETE via decomposition (config-loop). All three sub-tickets closed: EV-2c [38c7] dead internal flags + subprocess self-resolve (commit ca39db45); EV-2a [dab5] PROJECT_ROOT removal (commit b584f267); EV-2b [096c] TICKET_CMD validate seam removal (commit f2a74bad). Net effect: removed 7 dead/internal/duplicate env vars (_REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO, TICKET_SYNC_CMD, REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE [param-ified], REBAR_TICKET_CLI, TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH, PROJECT_ROOT, TICKET_CMD); subprocess handoffs self-resolve via in_process_cli()/wordlist_path(); fsck read-paths use the no_mutate param (no os.environ round-trip); sync-before-compact is a direct in-process pull (no shell=True). All EV-2 ACs met. Full offline suite green (1931) on each slice. Verify gate fail-closed preserved throughout.
